summary: Completed testing of NT Commerce iteration 62: 3 new robots (customer, pricing, maintenance), auto-reports API, and brute-force protection. All 22 backend tests passed (100%), frontend tests all passed.
critical_code_review_comments: All 6 robots properly initialized in RobotManager (inventory, debt, report, customer, pricing, maintenance)

New robots have correct stats fields: customer (checks, segments_updated, inactive_found, vip_found), pricing (checks, recommendations, slow_movers, margin_alerts), maintenance (checks, records_cleaned, indexes_created, health_checks)
Auto-reports API properly filters by report_type (daily, weekly, monthly) and requires super_admin auth
Brute-force protection correctly locks account after 5 failed attempts with Arabic error message
Frontend RobotsPage shows all 6 robot cards with correct testids (robot-card-customer, robot-card-pricing, robot-card-maintenance)
Frontend AutoReportsPage properly displays reports list with filter tabs and generate/refresh buttons
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - brute force tests used unique test emails (TEST_bruteforce_*@test.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 added 3 new robots (customer, pricing, maintenance) for 6 total, auto-reports API with filtering, and brute-force login protection. All tested and working. Robot endpoints require super_admin auth. Auto-reports page accessible at /auto-reports with filter tabs.

backend.GET_robots_status_6_robots: PASS - Returns all 6 robots (inventory, debt, report, customer, pricing, maintenance)
backend.POST_robots_run_customer: PASS - Triggers customer analysis with stats
backend.POST_robots_run_pricing: PASS - Triggers pricing analysis with stats
backend.POST_robots_run_maintenance: PASS - Triggers maintenance tasks with stats
backend.GET_auto_reports: PASS - Returns list of auto-generated reports
backend.brute_force_lockout_429: PASS - 6th failed attempt returns 429 with Arabic message
backend.brute_force_arabic_message: PASS - Returns 'الحساب مقفل. حاول بعد X دقيقة'
backend.normal_admin_login: PASS - admin@ntcommerce.com/Admin@2024 still works after brute force tests
backend.normal_tenant_login: PASS - ncr@ntcommerce.com/Test@123 still works after brute force tests

frontend.robot_cards_6: PASS - All 6 robot cards visible (robot-card-inventory, robot-card-debt, robot-card-report, robot-card-customer, robot-card-pricing, robot-card-maintenance)
frontend.robot_action_buttons: PASS - run and restart buttons present for all robots
frontend.report_filters: PASS - filter-all, filter-daily, filter-weekly, filter-monthly present
frontend.reports_list: PASS - Shows existing reports with daily type badges

mocked_apis.SMS_Service: MOCKED - Logs to console and database but does not send actual SMS
mocked_apis.Email_Service: Falls back to logging if SendGrid API key not configured
